Subject: Inquiry Regarding Room Availability for Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Management Team,

I am writing to formally request current information regarding room availability at your establishment for the upcoming weekend. Specifically, we are interested in securing accommodations from [Start Date] to [End Date]. Our party consists of [Number] guests, and we require [Number] rooms suitable for these dates.

Yo, what's up Hotel Manager!

Could you please provide details regarding your standard rates during this period and confirm whether special promotions apply? Furthermore, we would appreciate knowing if you have availability for any amenities, such as parking or breakfast service. We aim to finalize our reservation by [Deadline Date], so your prompt response would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. We look forward to your confirmation.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]  
[Your Title/Organization]<|im_end|>
